abstract.text: Here’s a full list of all 73 people who contributed to WWDCNotes – sorted by most contributions.
WWDCNotes is only possible thanks to these awesome volunteers! Contribute now to get listed here as well.
It’s a reminder of a sauce that I loved once

macOS EM @ Apple, Swift dev, Accessibility specialist – formerly Slack and Twitter.
Swift Content Creator | Engineering Manager at Insulet | Formerly Meta and HP
Independent Mac & iOS developer. Sometimes freelancing, mostly working on my own stuff these days.
Developer, architect, teacher, Apple platforms and geodata hacker.
